ddls:
CREATE TABLE "makes" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each make */,
  "make_name" TEXT /* Name of the make (e.g., FORD, CHEVROLET) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the make */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the headquarters of the make */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the make was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the make */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* ID of the make the model belongs to */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., BRONCO, COUNTRY SEDAN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "production_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the model started production */,
  "production_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the model ended production */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., SUV, Sedan, Truck) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_make_id FOREIGN KEY ("make_id") REFERENCES makes ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year(s) the model was produced (e.g., 68-66, 1969) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the year */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the production year */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the production year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_types" (
  "engine_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine type */,
  "engine_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the engine type (e.g., V8, V6, inline-4) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the engine type */,
  "cylinder_arrangement" TEXT /* Arrangement of cylinders (e.g., V, inline) */,
  "valve_configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of valves (e.g., DOHC, SOHC) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine block */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the engine block belongs to */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the engine block was produced */,
  "engine_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engine type */,
  "block_type" TEXT /* Type of engine block (e.g., V8, V6, inline-4) */,
  "cylinder_count" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine block */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Displacement of the engine block in cubic inches */,
  "liters" TEXT /* Liters capacity of the engine block */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., gasoline, diesel) */,
  "aspiration" TEXT /* Aspiration type (e.g., naturally aspirated, turbocharged) */,
  "bore_size" REAL /* Bore size of the cylinders in inches */,
  "stroke_length" REAL /* Stroke length of the pistons in inches */,
  "compression_ratio" REAL /* Compression ratio of the engine */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the engine in lb-ft */,
  "emissions_standard" TEXT /* Emissions standard the engine meets (e.g., Euro 6, EPA Tier 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_blocks_engine_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_type_id") REFERENCES engine_types ("engine_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_blocks_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_blocks_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cylinders" (
  "cylinder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cylinder */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engine block the cylinder belongs to */,
  "cylinder_number" INTEGER /* Number of the cylinder */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cylinder */,
  "bore_size" REAL /* Bore size of the cylinder in inches */,
  "stroke_length" REAL /* Stroke length of the cylinder in inches */,
  "compression_ratio" REAL /* Compression ratio of the cylinder */,
  "valves_per_cylinder" INTEGER /* Number of valves per cylinder */,
  "valve_type" TEXT /* Type of valves (e.g., intake, exhaust) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cylinder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cylinders_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES engine_blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_specs" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine specification */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engine block the specification belongs to */,
  "spec_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification (e.g., compression ratio, horsepower) */,
  "spec_value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specification */,
  "spec_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the specification value (e.g., HP, lb-ft, inches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_specs_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES engine_blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_docs" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine document */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engine block the document belongs to */,
  "doc_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "doc_file" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., manual, guide, report) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_docs_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES engine_blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engine block being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the engine block */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the engine block was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES engine_blocks ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., lead researcher, data analyst) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the member joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the member left the team (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
